display_name: 兔子镜小剧场 / Rabbit Mirror Theater（小小维修兔 v1.5 用户维修菜单版）
author: Toto
description: TEST build: adds Maintenance Rabbit v1.5 user-facing local repair menu for each individual RabbitMirror. Users can choose no response, visible code, broken appearance, force all known repairs, or generate a mirror-scoped full-chain diagnostic. Green status no longer blocks manual repair. Prompt, pools, Menu QR v2.1, and all existing features remain unchanged.
